feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE GI for Reservation (261) Mat Doc is created but withdrawn quantity is 0
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

When using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE Goods Issue for Reservation (261) Material Document is created but Withdrawn Quantity is 0. It happens only sporadically. The quantity is available in stock.

entry.title: SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 patch 15 - URGENT REQUIRMENT
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are in a situation with our SAP HANA update 1909. We are stuck with upgrade and there is no forward path due to the fact we are using SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 patch 14 which is not compatible with 2023 S4HANA and the product is no more supported by SAP. The patch 15 of SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 is compatible with SAP HANA 2023 but there is no way we can get the patch for this product. SAP or SalesForce both do not have the patch 15 and we are literally stuck. We are not able to uninstall this product and CLICK is heavily used by us and we have 2500 field user using it. We understood we need to look into other product like SAP FSM but for us to move forward with S4 HANA 2023 update we need patch 15 of SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3.

Does anyone has patch 15 of this product SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 and if you can find or know someone who can give use the patch 15.

This is urgent and need help.

Regards and thank you.

Arun Ghewarchand

entry.title: SICF service insert default port
entry.content:
Hi,

SICF service is picking up http port as default and we would like to change this to https port.
Can you please advice us how this can be achieved?

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA for HCM - Functions Not available in payroll schema
entry.content:
Hello,
in the notes on S/4HANA for HCM it is described that function P0083 is no longer available in the payroll schema.
if function P0083 is still available, payroll is canceled.
The same happens if function P2005 is still active in schema TC00. Function CHECk ABR is also omitted, but a warning is issued here.
It would be great if the omission of the functions P2005 and CHECK ABR were just as prominent as P0083 in the corresponding note.

Valeska Böger

entry.title: Vshere8
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Could you please confirm whether SAP S/4HANA is currently supported on VMware vSphere 8? I am trying to verify compatibility and would appreciate any official documentation or confirmation you can provide.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Table for material PO items
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently working on a business intelligence dashboard featuring POs. I need to show all the PO items for each PO, I'm doing this by linking the EKPO and ESLL tables using the PACKNO attribute.

This is working perfectly fine! Except for material POs. The item information shows up perfectly for service POs, but there is no PACKNO value assigned to any of the material POs.

Any clue about what might be causing this issue? Do I need to use another table for material POs? 

Any help is greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Date & time display according to user time zone (in document and change log display)
entry.content:
Description:

EN: Via transaction SU3, the SAP-users can configure the personal time zone but the configuration doesn´t take effect on all apps.

Some applications for sales documents aren´t considering the personal configuration of the user’s time zone but the system time zone regardless of whether the user has changed the personal time zone.

For international users is relevant to display the documents (sales orders, deliveries, etc.) with the corresponding local time zone. For Instance, on the log of changes document for sales orders, the system time isn´t being converted to the user time zone and causes confusion when analyzing or tracking events on sales documents chronologically. Some applications like the “document flow” convert it to user time but others like “changes document” not.

So, in case the user’s time zone is different to the system time zone, before displaying the dates and times should be converted.

The question would be, if SAP plans, in the short term, to provide a global solution to repair the wrong behaviour with the personal timezone or is a workaround available to be considered ?

Thanks in advance

Best Regards

Gaston

entry.title: About DMS repository configuration on newly migrated S4Hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP India,

We have recently migrated our ECC server with SAP S/4HANA 2022. Now we needs to configure DMS Repository with newly migrated SAP S/4HANA 2022 server from our old ECC server to S4Hana server.

entry.title: SECM_CONFIGURATION ends with ICM_HTTP_CONNECTION_BROKEN
entry.content:
Hi community,

while configuring ETD connections from S/4-system DM4 to ETD logcollector (running in kubernetes) when testing with "ping streaming" it ends with the message "HTTP Connectivity error: Connection to server broken (ICM_HTTP_CONNECTION_BROKEN).

On OS-level of application server DNS resolution works, as well as curl -vvk <hostname>:9095/1/version

entry.title: How to specify the usnam data of the rbkp table when creating a MIRO invoice.
entry.content:
When I use the BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_PARK BAPI to create a MIRO invoice, I tracked the standard code and found that an asynchronous update process is triggered when inserting data into the rbkp table. The method called by the asynchronous update process is MRM_INVOICE_HEADER_SAVE, within which usnam is directly set to sy-uname. I want to ask how to set it to a user of my choice.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: WANT TOLERANCE IN ALTERNATE UNIT OF MEASURE
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

Our product is steel based Tubes and we have base UoM is Kg and but we are selling the products in Kgs as well as Pcs.

we are maintaining the alternate Uom Pc with Kg, But in our steel industry, always conversion factor is not fix with reference to kg due to material thickness characteristics. 

Suppose we have received tubes order from customer in which customer is demanding 1.20mm thickness and but always it is not necessary that production will always be in 1.20mm thickness, it may be vary according to allowable thickness and due to this, conversion factor will not be same. 

our concern is that whenever we make gr against production order into system, system should allow us to change the weight as per actual which will be in defined tolerance limit. currently system is not allowing to change "Qty in SKU", it"s getting auto calculated based on conversion factor maintained in material master.

we are requesting you to suggest us the way, so that our stock can be valued properly.

thanks

entry.title: 'Could not determine EWM stock data for: Availability Group 001 error'.
entry.content: I keep getting this error message when trying to perform an inbound delivery. This occurs when trying to check the document distribution. Any help on this would be appreciated.

entry.title: Quotation Balance Not Reflecting When User Uses the quotation to create the Sales Order
entry.content:
While creation the sales order by using quotation use as with refences, the balance of the quotation is not reflecting as the open order quantity. Instead it displays the total quotation quantity to the user GUI screen  

In Performance Assistant it is mentioned as following but it is not working as it is like that 

Open reference quantity

Examples

  • A quotation item is complete only when it is fully referenced by a sales order. If the quotation item quantity is 100 pieces and the sales order calls for 20 pieces, the open quantity is 80 pieces.
  • A quantity contract item is complete only when it is fully referenced by a sales order. If the contract item quantity is 1000 pieces, the sales order calls for 20 pieces, and the customer returns 10 pieces, the open quantity is 990 pieces.
  • You copy one quotation into another. The open quantity remains the same.
  • An inquiry item is completed by the first reference to it. If the item quantity is 100 pieces and a subsequent quotation refers to 20 pieces, the open quantity is zero.

entry.title: How to reset the setup settings for a resource to which the setup matrix has been applied
entry.content:
The following setup matrix is available.
No. 　Pred.Setup Grp　 Succ.Setup Grp 　Setup Time 
1 　　FG1　　　　　　 FG1　　　　　　 0min 
2 　　FG2　　　　　　 FG2　　　　　　 0min 
3 　　FG1　　　　　　 FG2　　　　　　 120min 
4 　　FG2　　　　　　 FG1　　　　　　 180min 
5 　　Blank　　　　　  FG1　　　　　　 60min 
6 　　Blank 　　　　　 FG2 　　　　　　90min

In our factory, we reset the resource setup settings at the beginning of a holiday. (←This is the most important point)
So when we produce FG1 after the holiday, we want to apply No. 5 in the matrix. But before the holiday, FG2 was produced, so No. 4 is applied. I do not want this system to work.
Please see the image for details. Is there any way to apply No.5 instead of No.4 in this case?

 

What settings do I need to make? Is my way of creating the matrix correct? Please advise.

entry.title: Can GRN be restricted based on issued quantity in production order?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA (PP module), I want to control the GRN (Goods Receipt) posting from a production order based on the quantity of components issued.

Is it possible to:

- Allow GRN only for the quantity that has already been issued to the production order?
- Restrict GRN posting if component issue has not been done?
- Optionally, restrict component issue based on GRN quantity?

I want to ensure a tight control between component issue and GRN posting to avoid quantity mismatches.

Is there any standard functionality for this? Or do we need to use user-exits, BAdIs, or custom logic?

Thanks in advance!
Priyanka

entry.title: Fiori App: Manage Sales Order V2 does not start due to library-preload.js ERROR
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I try to start the standard Fiori App: Manage Sales Orders V2 on S/4Hana 2023 FPS03 and it end up with error... In Network logs I see that these links could not be loaded due to HTTP 404...

I have activated all the required SICF, OData V2/V4 Services and also this ...ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell SICF Service, but I still get this error:

/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library-preload.js

/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library-preload.json

/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library.js

Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.Details: { "info": "Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#SalesOrder-manageV2"", "technicalMessage": "failed to load 'sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library.js' from /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library.js: 404 ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library.js' from /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/cus/sd/lib/slsdoc/manage/library.js: 404
at we (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:6645)
at ge.failWith (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:4709)
at qe (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:13312)
at Oe (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:15314)
at Object.r [as require] (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:18696)
at https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-min-1.js:796:13217
at new Promise (<anonymous>)
at D (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-min-1.js:796:13184)
at async Promise.all (index 5)
at async Promise.all (index 0) Caused by: XHRLoadError: 404
at n (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:9251)
at XMLHttpRequest.<anonymous> (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:9504)
at o (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:3967)
at r.dispatch (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:4619)
at a.handleEvent (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29547)
at XMLHttpRequest.t [as _fnHandler] (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29890)
at a.send (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:32155)
at window.XMLHttpRequest.<computed> [as send] (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:309:318)
at je (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:9596)
at qe (https://***.com:8100/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20241106120400~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:9:13287)"}

Any idea how to solve it?

BR,

Milan

entry.title: ME2O/ME2ON does not extracts Reservations for MRP Area
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

As part of an SAP ECC to S/4HANA migration project for a multinational manufacturing company, we are implementing a reorganization of the Consignment Processing by adopting MRP Areas for vendors, replacing the previously used model.

In line with the guidelines provided by SAP Note 2516504 and this blog, we have configured the system to avoid the needing of creating specific material master data for the MRP Area and the automatic generation of transfer postings (movement type 541 O) from the Plant to the MRP Area to cover these requirements due to the MRP RUN (MD02, they don't use the MRP LIVE).

The planning process via MRP and the subsequent creation of transfer postings are functioning correctly. However, we have encountered unexpected behavior when using the ME2O (Stock provided to vendor) and ME2ON (Monitoring of stock provided to vendor) transactions.

Specifically, the ME2O/ME2ON transactions fail to extract the transfer postings if the components involved do not have specific material master data at the MRP Area level (i.e., there is no corresponding record in the MDMA table for the MRP Area in question). Consequently, it is impossible to use these transactions to initiate the shipment of components to the subcontractor.

This observed behavior seems to conflict with SAP guidelines, which would suggest that the creation of material master data at the MRP Area level is not a necessary prerequisite for the correct functioning of the scenario with MRP Areas for Consignment Processing.

Therefore, I would kindly like to request your support in understanding whether we have overlooked any fundamental configuration steps.

I'm available to provide further details on our configuration and the tests performed.

Thanks in advange

entry.title: stock transfer error
entry.content:
Material 3105 not maintained in plant 956B

Message No. M3351

i am getting this error while doing stock transfer between plants

entry.title: Fiori App ''My Inbox' Enhancement Requirement
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are looking to enhance the 'My Inbox' Fiori app for additional fields for PR and PO Approvals. We are looking for suggestions from SAP to approach this requirement.

 

Issue Details:

  1. New field will be made visible in 'My Inbox' App for PR and PO Approvals.
  2. Value for the new field will be based on data stored in SAP Tables.
  3. We need to understand the feasibility of the above requirement.
  4. If feasible what is the correct technical approach to this requirement?
  5. Are there any predefined hook up points or BADI available to make this enhancement?
  6. What are the supposed changes from ABAP and Fiori point of view?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change of item category from standard to different item category once PO is created
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Once a Purchase Order (PO) is created with the item category set as Standard, it is currently possible to update it to a different item category, provided there is no history.

 

We would like to know if it is possible to restrict changes to the item category in this scenario, or if a custom enhancement would be required.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
